_comment: Canonical label taxonomy for the WEDDEsign stack. Reconciles drift found across the four repos (Mentra and intelligence-core disagreed on colors; VectraIQ had only a bare `codex`; NordScope used an ad-hoc scheme). Apply with sync-labels.sh. Hooks/skills/workflows reference these names EXACTLY — a missing label makes the ceremony silently no-op.

labels.name: claude-task
labels.description: Multi-file, architectural, or judgment-heavy work suited to Claude

labels.name: codex-task
labels.description: Single-file, mechanical, unambiguous work suited to Codex

labels.name: no-issue
labels.description: PR intentionally has no linked issue (chore/dep bump/docs); exempts the Issue link check

labels.name: do-not-merge
labels.description: Visible hold for the human merge-gate — keep review running, don't land yet (not enforced)

labels.name: awaiting-codex-reping
labels.description: Codex review autopilot is mid-loop, waiting for green CI to post @codex review

labels.name: loop-stuck
labels.description: Codex review autopilot hit the round hard-stop (25); remove after human review to resume

dynamic_labels.description: Codex review autopilot round counter. Created on the fly by the autopilot (N is unbounded); NOT pre-seeded by the sync script.

legacy_unmanaged.name: codex
legacy_unmanaged.note: Present in all four repos with no agreed meaning. Left untouched by the sync script. Decide a meaning or retire it; do not let new tooling depend on it.
